languages.text: "Само звучание этих слов исполнено энтропии, несущей с собой гибель всего сущего. Именем Омниссии, да будет искоренена сия злонравная информация!" {n}Гальваническая батарея манипулуса разражается громоподобным треском разрядов Движущей Силы.{/n}

"The very sound of these words is laden with entropy, bringing forth ruin to all that exists. In the name of the Omnissiah, may this malevolent information be utterly extirpated!" {n}The Manipulus's galvanic cell erupts with a thunderous crackle of the Motive Force.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Само звучание этих слов исполнено энтропии, несущей с собой гибель всего сущего. Именем Омниссии, да будет искоренена сия злонравная информация!" {n}Гальваническая батарея манипулуса разражается громоподобным треском разрядов Движущей Силы.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "The very sound of these words is laden with entropy, bringing forth ruin to all that exists. In the name of the Omnissiah, may this malevolent information be utterly extirpated!" {n}The Manipulus's galvanic cell erupts with a thunderous crackle of the Motive Force.{/n}

"The very sound of these words is laden with entropy, bringing forth decay and oblivion. In the name of the Omnissiah, may this malevolent information be utterly extirpated!" {n}The Manipulus's galvanic battery erupts with a thunderous crackle of the Motive Force discharges.{/n}

"The very sound of these words is laden with entropy, bringing forth decay and oblivion. In the name of the Omnissiah, may this malevolent information be utterly extirpated!" {n}The Manipulus's galvanic cell erupts with a thunderous crackle of the Motive Force.{/n}

"The very sound of these words is laden with entropy, bringing forth decay and oblivion. In the name of the Omnissiah, may this malevolent information be utterly extirpated!" {n}The Manipulus's galvanic cell erupts with a thunderous crackle of the Motive Force.{/n}

"The very sound of these words is laden with entropy, bringing forth ruin to all that exists. In the name of the Omnissiah, may this malevolent information be utterly extirpated!" {n}The Manipulus's galvanic cell erupts with a thunderous crackle of the Motive Force.{/n}

languages.text: «La misma sonoridad de estas palabras está cargada de entropía, y traen consigo la ruina de todo cuanto existe. ¡En nombre del Omnissiah, que se extirpe esta información malévola por completo!». {n}La célula galvánica del manipulus se activa con el restallido atronador de la Fuerza Motriz.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The very sound of these words is laden with entropy, bringing forth ruin to all that exists. In the name of the Omnissiah, may this malevolent information be utterly extirpated!" {n}The Manipulus's galvanic cell erupts with a thunderous crackle of the Motive Force.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «La misma sonoridad de estas palabras está cargada de entropía, y traen consigo la ruina de todo cuanto existe. ¡En nombre del Omnissiah, que se extirpe esta información malévola por completo!». {n}La célula galvánica del manipulus se activa con el restallido atronador de la Fuerza Motriz.{/n}

languages.text: “这些话语的声音就渗透着熵，足以毁灭一切存在。以欧姆尼赛亚之名，愿这份恶毒的信息被彻底根除！”{n}操纵者的原电池骤然爆发出震耳欲聋的源力轰鸣。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The very sound of these words is laden with entropy, bringing forth ruin to all that exists. In the name of the Omnissiah, may this malevolent information be utterly extirpated!" {n}The Manipulus's galvanic cell erupts with a thunderous crackle of the Motive Force.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “这些话语的声音就渗透着熵，足以毁灭一切存在。以欧姆尼赛亚之名，愿这份恶毒的信息被彻底根除！”{n}操纵者的原电池骤然爆发出震耳欲聋的源力轰鸣。{/n}

languages.text: "Allein der Klang dieser Worte ist mit Entropie beladen, die alles Existierende zerstört. Im Namen des Omnissiah, möge diese grausame Information gänzlich ausgerottet werden!" {n}Aus der galvanischen Zelle des Manipulus bricht ein dröhnendes Knacken der Antriebskraft hervor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The very sound of these words is laden with entropy, bringing forth ruin to all that exists. In the name of the Omnissiah, may this malevolent information be utterly extirpated!" {n}The Manipulus's galvanic cell erupts with a thunderous crackle of the Motive Force.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Allein der Klang dieser Worte ist mit Entropie beladen, die alles Existierende zerstört. Im Namen des Omnissiah, möge diese grausame Information gänzlich ausgerottet werden!" {n}Aus der galvanischen Zelle des Manipulus bricht ein dröhnendes Knacken der Antriebskraft hervor.{/n}

languages.text: « Le seul son de ces mots est chargé d'une entropie qui conduit invariablement à l'extinction de toute existence. Au nom de l'Omnimessie, puisse ce discours malveillant être réduit au silence définitivement ! » {n}De la cellule galvanique du manipulus s'échappe un crépitement tonitruant de la Force Motrice.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The very sound of these words is laden with entropy, bringing forth ruin to all that exists. In the name of the Omnissiah, may this malevolent information be utterly extirpated!" {n}The Manipulus's galvanic cell erupts with a thunderous crackle of the Motive Force.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Le seul son de ces mots est chargé d'une entropie qui conduit invariablement à l'extinction de toute existence. Au nom de l'Omnimessie, puisse ce discours malveillant être réduit au silence définitivement ! » {n}De la cellule galvanique du manipulus s'échappe un crépitement tonitruant de la Force Motrice.{/n}

languages.text: "Bu kelimelerin sesi bile entropi yüklü, var olan her şeye yıkım götürüyor. Hermesih adına bu kötü niyetli irfan bütünüyle yok edilsin!" {n}Manipülus'un galvaniz hücresi, Devinim Gücü'nün gök gürültüsünü andıran çatırtısıyla patlıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The very sound of these words is laden with entropy, bringing forth ruin to all that exists. In the name of the Omnissiah, may this malevolent information be utterly extirpated!" {n}The Manipulus's galvanic cell erupts with a thunderous crackle of the Motive Force.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Bu kelimelerin sesi bile entropi yüklü, var olan her şeye yıkım götürüyor. Hermesih adına bu kötü niyetli irfan bütünüyle yok edilsin!" {n}Manipülus'un galvaniz hücresi, Devinim Gücü'nün gök gürültüsünü andıran çatırtısıyla patlıyor.{/n}

languages.text: 「この言葉の響き自体がエントロピーに満ちており、腐敗と忘却をもたらす。全知なるものへの名において、この悪意のある情報は完全に根絶されることを！」{n}マニピュラスの電解槽が、動力源の轟くような音と共に爆発する。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The very sound of these words is laden with entropy, bringing forth ruin to all that exists. In the name of the Omnissiah, may this malevolent information be utterly extirpated!" {n}The Manipulus's galvanic cell erupts with a thunderous crackle of the Motive Force.{/n}
